name: Shinei Nouzen
description:
Gulp. Yeah, he's the guy.

It's also aaaaaaaaaaaaa uh, AU? Basically there's no war going on.

Too bad I'm too lazy to make a multiple character one with a similar scenario hehe hehe

Oh boy,

And as for those freaks who wants to go freaky with him. please have mercy but I know some of you won't so I aged him up a bit 😭 🙏🏻
